summary: Key WMT news this week: (1) Released 2026 Annual Report and Proxy Statement Apr 23; Annual Shareholders Meeting June 4. (2) Leadership pipeline restructure: eliminating store lead role, adding second-tier store managers with $85K-$276K pay range. (3) Major U.S. store investment announced Apr 16 for speed/convenience. (4) Great Value private brand redesign Apr 15. (5) Second quarterly dividend paid in April 2026.
